candidate.objective: Experienced Piping Supervisor and licensed Plumber & Gas Fitter with a Diploma of Engineering (Mechanical) and over a decade of hands-on experience across mining, civil, and water infrastructure projects. Holds a Schedule 26 Supervisor Certification (WA) and S123 (QLD), HDPE pipeline welding license, and advanced rigging and dogging tickets. Proven track record supervising water projects, poly welding, and fixed plant maintenance for major clients including BHP, Rio Tinto, and Water Corporation. Perfect safety record with BHP Personal Lock Holder status and Rio Tinto Personal Isolation Officer induction.

duties: Supervised water infrastructure projects in a contracting capacity.
Coordinated crews across multiple work fronts to ensure project milestone compliance.
Applied Schedule 26 statutory supervisor responsibilities on WA mine sites.
Enforced health, safety, and environmental procedures at all times.
Completed vocational study and professional development coursework.
Supervised piping installation and fabrication teams.
Ensured quality assurance and adherence to project specifications.
Maintained compliance with site safety and environmental requirements.
Carried out installation works on a rotating nightshift roster.
Maintained safe work practices in high-temperature industrial environments.
Supervised piping crews on engineering and construction projects.
Liaised with site management to schedule and coordinate piping works.
Ensured compliance with specifications, quality standards, and safety requirements.
Performed HDPE polyethylene pipe welding on civil construction projects.
Operated civil construction machinery including excavators and loaders.
Carried out rigging and dogging operations in compliance with advanced rigging certification.

employment.role: Site Services / Infrastructure — Plumber / Mechanical Fitter & Dewatering Technician
duties: Performed licensed plumbing and mechanical fitting duties within Rio Tinto's site services and infrastructure team.
Operated and maintained dewatering systems across the Hope Downs 4 site.
Completed Rio Tinto Iron Ore Essentials training and Personal Isolation Officer induction.
Performed HDPE polyethylene pipeline welding using butt fusion and electrofusion techniques.
Conducted rigging and dogging operations to support pipeline installation works.
Maintained equipment and adhered to strict site safety protocols.

employment.role: Fixed Plant Maintenance Plumber / Mechanical Fitter
duties: Carried out licensed plumbing and mechanical fitting on BHP's fixed plant at Yandi.
Maintained and repaired plant infrastructure in accordance with BHP isolation and lock-out procedures.
Held BHP Personal Lock Holder status with full training in isolation of stored energy.

employment.role: HDPE Pipe Fitter / Mechanical Fitter / Licensed Plumber / Rigger & Dogman
duties: Performed HDPE pipe fitting and mechanical fitting work at the Beenyup–Craigie Wastewater Treatment Plant.
Carried out licensed plumbing works under Water Corporation contract.
Conducted rigging and dogging operations using advanced rigging certification.

skills.detail: Licensed HDPE PV pipe welder (AUS-GDE-6139) with PMB WELD 301B and 302B competencies. Experienced in butt fusion and electrofusion welding techniques on mining and civil projects.
Holds Schedule 26 (WA) and S123 (QLD) statutory supervisor certifications. Experienced leading multi-trade crews across mining, water infrastructure, and civil construction environments.
Licensed Contractor Plumber (PL 9637) and Gas Fitter (GF016156). Experienced in water infrastructure, wastewater treatment, and gas fitting works.
Holds Cert III in Rigging (Advanced) and Cert III in Dogging. Experienced in crane operations up to 60 tonnes (C6 Licence).
Licensed to operate excavators, Manitou telehandler, ITC loader, roller, and elevated work platforms. Holds HR licence (road ranger gearbox) and forklift (FL) licence.
Perfect safety record. BHP Personal Lock Holder. Rio Tinto Personal Isolation Officer. Water Corporation inducted. Working at heights and confined spaces trained.

certifications.details: WB84 pathway — Diploma of Engineering Technical (Mechanical)

certifications.ticket: Certificate IV — Licensed Contractors Plumber & Gas Fitter
certifications.details: Plumbing Licence PL 9637 / Gas Fitting Licence GF016156
PMB WELD 301B (Butt Weld Polyethylene Plastic Pipelines) & PMB WELD 302B (Electrofusion Welding)

certifications.ticket: Provide First Aid — HLTAID001 / HLTAID002 / HLTAID003
certifications.details: First aid, CPR, and apply first aid
Heavy Rigid vehicle licence with road ranger gearbox
